summary: Color-graded, desaturated video with no speech, posted by a Border Patrol chief. Footage includes a point-of-view shot from horseback as a mounted Border Patrol agent rides through open desert scrub at low light, another agent leaning on a fence rail in the brush, and an overhead aerial shot of agents on foot and on horseback gathered with a group of people on a grassy hillside. The aerial frame carries a compass heading and coordinate overlay and large red block text reading '13 ILLEGAL ALIENS ARRESTED.' The audio is a music bed. The tweet text describes the apprehension of 13 people in the Sonoran Desert near Nogales, one identified with cartel ties.

script.scene: Point-of-view shot from horseback riding through desert scrub toward a second mounted agent at low light, sepia color grade.
Overhead aerial shot of agents on foot and horseback with a group of people on a grassy hillside; compass and coordinate overlay; red block text '13 ILLEGAL ALIENS ARRESTED.'
